description_long: This house is a large, multi-unit residential building with a modern, utilitarian design, featuring flat and low-pitched gable roofs. The exterior is predominantly white with large rectangular windows arranged in rows, providing ample natural light. The structure includes multiple connected volumes, some with rooftop terraces or open decks finished in a light wood texture. A prominent feature is the front parking area, which accommodates several cars and is bordered by a low fence. The main entryway is sheltered by a covered porch, and the building is surrounded by a perimeter fence, suggesting a private, enclosed property. The overall layout and massing indicate a focus on functionality and communal living, typical of urban residential complexes.
description: A large, modern multi-unit house with flat and gable roofs, white exterior, and a front parking area. Features include large windows, rooftop terraces, and a covered entry porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, parking area with multiple cars, and the building's white facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat-roofed section, rows of windows, and the full length of the parking area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying rooftop terraces, open decks, and the interconnected volumes of the house.
description_view_3: Back view showing additional building volumes, the perimeter fence, and the parking area extending to the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, simple door, and minimal decorative elements
